/usr/bin/ar qc libxva_lib.a CMakeFiles/xva_lib.dir/src/utils/Common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xva_lib.dir/src/models/HullWhiteModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xva_lib.dir/src/instruments/InterestRateSwap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xva_lib.dir/src/simulation/MonteCarloEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xva_lib.dir/src/simulation/ExposureCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xva_lib.dir/src/xva/CVACalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xva_lib.dir/src/xva/DVACalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xva_lib.dir/src/xva/FVACalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xva_lib.dir/src/xva/MVACalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xva_lib.dir/src/xva/XVAAggregator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xva_lib.dir/src/utils/DateUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xva_lib.dir/src/utils/MathUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xva_lib.dir/src/utils/Logger.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libxva_lib.a
